browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Water Bodies, Water Extent
collectionDescription:
The **High Resolution Water Layer (HRWL)** product provides classified maps showing permanent water, temporary water, dry areas, and sea water. It is a multi-annual product, typically covering a **7-year period**, and is updated every 3 years. It is based on the annual Water Cover Duration (WCD) production, which combines water masks from **Sentinel-1** radar and **Sentinel-2** optical imagery with Water/Ice Cover data from Sentinel-2 (WIC S2).
  
  The product is generated at the European scale with a spatial resolution of **10 m × 10 m**. 
  
  **Data availability**: HRWL is available for the reference years 2021 and 2024 and can be downloaded in multiple projections and pixel spacings. 
  
  More information [here](https://land.copernicus.eu/en/products/water-bodies/high-resolution-water-layer).

layers.longDescription: Classified layer, differentiating the classes of permanent water (1), temporary water (2), and dry areas (0). The dataset can also have the following values: cloud or cloud shadow (205), sea water (253), or no data (255)
Occurrence of water areas throughout the entire observation period (between 0 and 100).
Quality layer providing an assessment of the water layer (WL) quality (between 0 and 100).
